reference: Elevated parathyroid hormone is a manifestation of chronic kidney disease - mineral and bone disease spectrum. Check your vitamin D level and replace it if there is a deficiency. It will correct the parathyroid hormone level.
text: Elevated parathyroid hormone is a manifestation of chronic kidney disease, mineral and bone disease spectrum. Check your vitamin D level and replace it if there is a deficiency. It will correct the parathyroid hormone level.
